name: Garbanzo Shepherds Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons cornstarch mixed with 1/4 cup cold water
1/2 bunch spinach, washed and trimmed (about 2 cups)
1/2 tablespoon Parsley Patch seasoning, general blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. In a large pot, cook onions and mushrooms with water for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Add carrots and celery; continue cooking until tender (about 10 minutes).
4. Add spinach; cover and steam until wilted (about 1 minute). Remove from heat.
5. Mix soy milk with soy sauce, Parsley Patch, and garlic powder in a separate saucepan.
6. Add cornstarch mixture to the vegetable pot; stir until boiling and thickening.
7. Stir in garbanzo beans and peas.
8. Spoon into six to eight individual casserole dishes. Top with mashed potatoes and sprinkle with paprika.
9. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden.
Mashed Potatoes:
1. Steam potatoes over boiling water for 15 minutes.
2. Place in a bowl; stir with soy milk and onion powder.
3. Mash until smooth.
